message:
fix(fcp-store): handle NotFound in execute_plan for concurrent GC tolerance

execute_plan propagated NotFound from store.delete() as an error, but between
the planning and execution phases another concurrent GC run could have already
deleted the candidate object. The symbol-pruning path already handles NotFound
as a no-op (line 342-347); make the object-only path consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
